Name: https://www.active-d-vcom.com/we12314314/ss-231
Description: Our e-commerce platform sustains an average of 100,000 daily visitors, peaking at 250,000 during holiday sales. Built on a robust architecture utilizing React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend, it ensures a seamless and responsive user experience. The site is hosted on AWS, leveraging Elastic Load Balancing to distribute traffic and Amazon RDS for scalable database management. Performance monitoring is conducted using New Relic, allowing real-time visibility into application performance and user satisfaction levels. Security is fortified with Cloudflare, providing DDoS protection and SSL encryption.

The portal integrates Google Analytics for detailed traffic analysis and user engagement metrics, ensuring content and features align with user needs. Data security and privacy are ensured through strict compliance with GDPR and other regulatory standards.
